content.problemStatement:
Write a program that utilizes a while loop to print the squares of numbers from 1 to NNN.

Check the sample input / output below further clarity

code.C++:
num = int(input())
# Solution as follows
n = 1
while n <= num:
    print(n * n, end=" ")
    n += 1
code.Python3:
num = int(input())
# Solution as follows
n = 1
while n <= num:
    print(n * n, end=" ")
    n += 1
code.C:
